links.source_location: System summary: 'Anchor is a Tauri desktop application... Target platform is Windows for MVP'
System summary and Component map describe the same architecture at different levels of detail
System summary: 'Billable/non-billable classification is explicitly out of scope'
System summary: 'Tracking is fully manual (no passive activity inference)'
System summary: 'every state transition is durably appended to a JSON Lines transition log with checksum-based torn-write detection'
Component map: transition log read/write/checksum/compaction logic
Component map: 'both reading from the same backend state via IPC'
Persisted state describes the same JSON Lines transition log structure as the Transition log format decision
